calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing For Entry Of Judgment By Court After Default [Ccp 585 (B)
Off Calendar Oct-19-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR 6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Michael C. Hall, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Biga Venice, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Mason McDuffie Real Estate, Inc.
Default was entered against defendant on February 6, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed September 1, 2017.
Order granting waiver of witness appearance at prove-up hearing was filed on October 17, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Biga Venice, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Mason McDuffie Real Estate, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $379,663.48.
Attorney Fees - $3,593.38.
Costs - $545.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $383,801.86.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Hearing For Entry Of Judgment By Court After Default [Ccp 585 (B)
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Continued To Oct-19-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-28-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2017 Continued To Aug-30-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
